title: Supplementary material 4 from: Rosenblad MA, Martín MP, Tedersoo L, Ryberg M, Larsson E, Wurzbacher C, Abarenkov K, Nilsson RH (2016) Detection of signal recognition particle (SRP) RNAs in the nuclear ribosomal internal transcribed spacer 1 (ITS1) of three lineages of ectomycorrhizal fungi (Agaricomycetes, Basidiomycota). MycoKeys 13: 21-33. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.13.8579
author: Alm Rosenblad, Magnus
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
SRP RNA multiple sequence alignment
      : Explanation note: Multiple sequence alignment with the SRP RNA sequences of Dumesic et al. (2015; Stereum hirsutum, Heterobasidion irregulare, and Heterobasidion annosum) aligned to our newly generated ITS sequences of Russula and Lactarius.
steps_raw:
SRP RNA multiple sequence alignment
      : Explanation note: Multiple sequence alignment with the SRP RNA sequences of Dumesic et al. (2015; Stereum hirsutum, Heterobasidion irregulare, and Heterobasidion annosum) aligned to our newly generated ITS sequences of Russula and Lactarius.
